framework.name: EU AI Act
framework.description: European Union regulation on artificial intelligence.

controls.title: Transparency for Generative AI
controls.description: Ensure transparency obligations for generative AI systems.
controls.implementationGuidance: Implement content disclosure and provenance mechanisms.
controls.evidenceGuidance: Document transparency measures and user disclosures.

controls.title: High-Risk AI System Requirements
controls.description: Comply with requirements for high-risk AI systems.
controls.implementationGuidance: Establish risk management system per Annex IX.
controls.evidenceGuidance: Risk management documentation and conformity assessment.

controls.title: Transparency for Emotion Recognition
controls.description: Inform users when emotion recognition or biometric categorization is used.
controls.implementationGuidance: Implement user notification and consent mechanisms.
controls.evidenceGuidance: User disclosure documentation and consent records.
